Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division 2017

Article 2.heading: By this Order, I issue Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts (“RDC”) – establishing a specialist Technology and Construction Division (“TCD”)

Article 3.heading: In accordance with Rule 56.6 of the RDC, I hereby appoint Justice Sir Richard Field to be the in charge of the TCD.Judge (/glossary/judge/)

Article 4.heading: Part 56 of the RDC will come into force on 1 October 2017

Article 5.heading: This shall fi rst be refl ected in the online version of the RDC, and subsequently in hardcopies published by the DIFC DRA Academy of Law
